name: chrY_PAR1
description: Pseudoautosomal region 1 (PAR1) at the tip of chrYp and chrXp. ~2.78 Mb of sequence identical (>99.99%) between the two sex chromosomes; obligate crossover region for male meiosis. Contains 24 genes including SHOX (Leri-Weill dyschondrosteosis), CSF2RA, IL3RA, ZBED1. PAR1 sequence is fundamentally non-unique to either chrX or chrY at the reference level — short reads mapping here will always be ambiguous unless using a sex-aware reference. Standard practice: map the PAR1 reads to a 'PAR-masked' chrY (chrY with PAR1 hard-masked) and keep them on chrX.
expected_copy_count: 2 copies per male genome (chrX and chrY both carry PAR1); 2 copies per female genome (both chrX)
